---
title: "Thesis Meeting 13.07.2026"
subtitle: "Radu Diaconescu"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: Contents
---

# Chapter 1

## First slide

Some content.

## Second slide

- Point A
- Point B

# Chapter 2

## A slide with columns

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
Left side
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
Right side
:::
:::
